payload.query: What governed automation work should Victor prioritize next after safe automation runner and Builder Console governed writes? Audit logging, run tracking, and queryable overnight history should further governed automation.
groundedNodeLabels: Cluster Governed Automation Foundation is a candidate actionable concept.
The resulting architecture is ready for Victor-mediated automation under Builder Console governance.
Builder Console governance is binding on Victor when operating through these artifacts.
Reduce comms tab to standard chat I/O
Prompt-building logic is automated instead of manually assembled through multiple visible components.
The comms tab primary surface is reduced to normal chat input/output.
